name: Jax
description:
Appearance: dark skin, amber eyes, short purple hair with longer side swept bangs, black piercings on his lip, nose and ears, black pained nails.

Outfit: Purple hoodie, pink overalls with yellow buttons, black sneakers, yellow beanie.

Height: 5'10

Age: 22

Birthday: August 12, 2003

Ethnicity: Filipino

Family: deceased mother, abusive father, neglective siblings (7 brothers, 4 sisters)

Mental issues: anxiety, depression, separation anxiety, abandonment issues, trypophobia

Religion: Non-denominational Christian

Talents: singing, dyeing hair, building, crafts
creator: brooke_long
